ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "members" TEXT /* List of team members */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the team */,
  "team_category" TEXT /* Category of the team (e.g., professional, amateur) */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team coach */,
  "coach_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the team coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with the contract */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event associated with the contract */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., sponsorship, performance) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the contract (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "contract_terms" TEXT /* Terms and conditions of the contract */,
  "contract_value" TEXT /* Total value of the contract */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms and schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event is held */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., sports, talent show) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "organizer_name" TEXT /* Name of the event organizer */,
  "organizer_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the event organizer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that received the score */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event where the score was awarded */,
  "tricks" INTEGER /* Number of tricks performed by the team */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Total score awarded to the team */,
  "judges_scores" TEXT /* Scores from each judge */,
  "average_score" TEXT /* Average score from all judges */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team to which the participant belongs */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the participant in the team (e.g., performer, backup) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, judge, participant) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role associated with the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judges" (
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judge */,
  "judge_name" TEXT /* Name of the judge */,
  "judge_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the judge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores_judges" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* ID of the score entry */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score given by the judge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id", "judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_teams" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the team in the event (e.g., confirmed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "team_id")
)
